feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Profile icon on Fiori Screen not working for Macbook (Safari browser)
entry.content: Post version upgrade, users using Macbook and Safari browser are unable to operate the "Profile" icon. It is no longer clicable.

entry.title: The price is not being picked up in the PO from the Info Record.
entry.content: The price is not being picked up in the PO from the Info Record. I have maintained the price in the Info Record, and while creating the PO, the system is not fetching the price. I also tried "Carry Out New Pricing", but the issue still persists.

entry.title: ABAWによりマイナス簿価
entry.content:
サポート　ご担当者　様

減損をして償却費計上をすると簿価がマイナスになる場合があります。

本来、償却費はメモ値の1円でストップするのが会計上(J-GAAP、IFRSなど)のリーガル要件と認識しております。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: WBS Validation Table PRTE Not Available in Boolean Class Despite VWTYGB01 and RGUGBR00 – Error GB082
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are unable to use the WBS Basic Start Date (PRTE-PSTRT) and Basic Finish Date (PRTE-PENDE) fields in our PS Validation (OPSI). This is blocking us from enforcing a mandatory date validation for Level 2 WBS elements under company codes S135 and S100, which is a key data quality control requirement for our Investment project type.


Validation Configuration:
Validation Name: ZPS01 — Scania WBS Validation
Step 008 — Bsic strt & end dates are mandatory

Prerequisite:
PRPS-PRART = 'IV' AND PRPS-STUFE = '2' AND PRPS-PBUKR = 'S135' AND PRPS-PBUKR = 'S100'

Check:
PRTE-PSTRT <> ' ' AND PRTE-PENDE <> ' '

Message: ZFI_M 106 — Error (Invalid logical system) (This message is just for the testing purpose).

Steps Performed to Make PRTE Available:
By default, the WBS date fields PRTE-PSTRT (Basic Start Date) and PRTE-PENDE (Basic Finish Date) are not available in the Validation & Substitution Boolean class structure pool for PS WBS Elements. To make them available, the following two steps were pe

entry.title: MARA物料创建日期为2025年，但EBEWH表已存在2024年估价条目记录
entry.content: MARA物料创建日期为2025年，但EBEWH表已存在2024年估价条目记录

entry.title: wrong WBS ID while creating project from template
entry.content: I create operative project in CJ20N from the standard template project (standard project definition CCC.CCCC.CCC.CCCC with one WBS element with the same ID CCC.CCCC.CCC.CCCC). Newly created project ID is W10.CP00.W10.2603. The result is: system creates project definition with correct ID W10.CP00.W10.2603 and the WBS element with ID W10.CP00.WCC.CCCC. Only first 10 digits of target project definition are copied to WBS ID. Why and how to fix it? I need the new WBS to have the ID W10.CP00.W10.2603

entry.title: Error FZ 349: Vendor && is contained in proposal &&; no editin
entry.content:
Dear SAP

We reviewed OSS Note 1703252 (F110 - Error FZ 349: Vendor && is contained in proposal &&; no editing). The note says:   When run transaction F110 for a vendor/customer account, an entry in table REGUS is created to block the account. Once this entry is created, the vendor cannot be included in another payment proposal as the following error message appears: FZ 349:Vendor & & is contained in proposal & &; no editing.

Is there any setting that can be applied to transaction F110 so that the system does not block the vendor entirely, but instead blocks only specific line items?

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: A custom field was added to BSEG, but it cannot be edited in FB02 in S/4HANA.
entry.content: Why is the approach to adding custom fields to BSEG different between ECC and S/4HANA? . With the same configuration(OB32 ), editing is not possible in S/4HANA.

entry.title: Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted
entry.content:
While uploading legacy asset with value through LTMC error"Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted".

As per the template their is one template combine for legacy asset master creation and uploading the value.

Please suggest how to proceed. 

Attaching the template for reference.

LTMC project name - Akums_Asset_Final

entry.title: Execute in Background option not available in mb51 report despite full SAP authorizations.
entry.content:
Issue Details:

We are facing an issue in transaction MB51 where the "Execute in Background" option is not available.

We have verified the following:

  • The affected user has all the required SAP authorizations.

  • The issue is also reproducible with a user having full SAP access.

  • No authorization errors are generated.

Kindly analyze whether this is due to standard SAP behavior, a configuration issue, or a product defect. If any SAP Note or correction is required, please provide the recommended solution.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA On-Premise 2023 Integration with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (SFM)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on integrating SAP S/4HANA On-Premise 2023 with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (SFM) and would appreciate your guidance on the recommended integration approach.

I have the following questions:

Q1. Is SAP CPI mandatory for integrating SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise with SAP SFM?

Q2. Is the sap-sfm-integration-accelerator package mandatory for integrating SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise with SAP SFM, or is it optional?

Q3. The SAP SFM 'Manage Source Systems' app lists SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition as a supported source type for CDS-based replication. Does this same replication and extension framework (Manage Replications + Configure Extensions for Replications) also apply to On-Premise 2023, or does On-Premise require a different integration path?

Q4. How can transactional data be imported into SAP SFM? If I want to route a standard CDS view to a custom CDS view during the replication process, where can this mapping or redirection be configured?

Q5. What is the BADI for implementing customer-specific rules for MD and TD in SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise? In SAP SFM, the "Configure Extensions for Replications" app only exposes a CDS View option for extensibility, and no BADI option is available. For scenarios where a CDS view is not sufficient for MD/TD, is there a supported BADI or another enhancement framework for implementing customer-specific MD and TD logic in this integration with SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise? If so, where is it exposed and how can it be implemented?

Thank you for taking the time to read our questions. We greatly appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or experiences you can share.

Regards,
Shiva

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01 Fully-Activated Appliance
entry.content: Could anyone help provide a Baidu Netdisk download link for SAP S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01 Fully-Activated Appliance? My S-User account does not have download permissions. Thanks！

entry.title: Joule Sales Query – V4 Service Group Not Available
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

While testing Joule sales-related queries, we are receiving the below error in/IWFND/ERROR_LOG:

Service group'UI_SALESDOCUMENTLIST_AI' not published.

We have verified that the V4 Service Group UI_SALESDOCUMENTLIST_AI is not available in our S/4HANA system, although the required Joule-related V1 APIs have already been activated. 

 

Please find the attached screenshots for reference 

Could you please confirm:

  • Whether UI_SALESDOCUMENTLIST_AI is a prerequisite for Joule sales scenarios.
  • Any required SAP Notes, software components, or configuration needed to make this service group available.

Kind Regards,

Amarnath

entry.title: Request for Guidance – Material Search by Long Text in PO Creation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We have received a request from the business to enable searching for materials using long text during PO creation. Could you please confirm if there is a standard or recommended approach in SAP to achieve this functionality?

 

Regards,

Parasuram.

entry.title: unable to select dropdown list in Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Sap Team,

unable to select dropdown list in Fiori . attached document is for your reff.

 

Regards,

Abhishek

entry.title: New Item category determination not allowing to create sales order for cross selling line item
entry.content:
The Business requirement is to create to new Item category determination for below combination for Order type OR.
SaTy   ItCGr     Usge     ItemCat-HighLevItem     DfItC
TA        ZFOC    CSEL   ZLTA                                         ZLNN


Issue: 
When we are doing new configuration for Item category determination with Usage with required combination, system is showing error as, ‘No item category available error” while creating sales order.

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 -Extension issue
entry.content: We are facing an issue in BAPI_PO_CREATE1 with an extension with custom fields with a standard structure like BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER.

entry.title: PO Change Message misbehavior
entry.content:
We have the issue, that SAP are sending out to the supplier a PO-Change Message also if we are just changing the purchase group in the PO header. 

This field is not defined in the customizing (in the table T166C) as relevant for the PO-Change message.

entry.title: When selecting Order Status = "Not Yet Sent" in the Monitor Purchase Order Items tile, not all quali
entry.content:
We observed that certain released POs with the Email output channel in "In Preparation" status are missing from the report, while other POs with similar statuses are displayed correctly.

Examples:

Purchase Order

Release Status

Email Output Status

Appears in "Not Yet Sent" Report

3800006569

Released

In Preparation

No

3800005606

Released

In Preparation

Yes

3700148012

R

entry.title: PO No Not Visible in ME53N
entry.content:
PO was Created With Respect to PR.

But Po no was not visible in Purchase Order Column.

Also Po no was was not visible in Eban:-EBELN & EBELP Field.

Where as the same was visible in PR status Tab.

PR no:-1100174948,LI:-50
